headline: Ameriprise (AMP): 10 Most Undervalued Quality Stocks to Invest In
summary: Ameriprise Financial Inc. (NYSE:AMP) is one of the most undervalued quality stocks to invest in. On June 3, Pattern Wealth, a private wealth advisory practice managing ~$160 million in client assets, joined the branch channel of Ameriprise Financial from Thrivent Investment Management.
